query:
-- 查询重庆合伙人在partners表中的记录
SELECT 'PARTNERS_TABLE' as source, id, name, phone FROM partners WHERE name LIKE '%重庆%';

-- 查询重庆合伙人在users表中的记录
SELECT 'USERS_TABLE' as source, id, name, phone FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%重庆%' OR roles LIKE '%cityPartner%';

-- 查询重庆合伙人的partner_cities记录
SELECT 'PARTNER_CITIES' as source, pc.partnerId, p.name as partnerName, c.name as cityName, pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%重庆%';

-- 查询重庆合伙人的user_role_cities记录
SELECT 'USER_ROLE_CITIES' as source, urc.userId, u.name as userName, urc.role, urc.cities
FROM user_role_cities urc
LEFT JOIN users u ON urc.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%重庆%' OR urc.cities LIKE '%重庆%';
